summary: Frontend-only verification of /catch-22 long-form brief, /duty-of-care alias, ProblemSection teaser, AboutSection 3-card team (incl. Dr. Sidra Azmat Butt as Head of Algorithmic Validation while Advisory Board entry preserved), Footer link, and sitemap. All 13 specified scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: CatchTwentyTwo.jsx is ~1100 lines — consider splitting BriefSection/SubHeading/Callout/ComparisonTable into a /components/brief/ folder; not blocking but helps long-term maintainability.
Several lucide-react icons imported but unused (Users) — minor, no functional impact.
test_credentials: n/a — admin flows out of scope
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified at https://eu-travel-risk.preview.emergentagent.com. /catch-22 hero title 'The Duty of Care vs. Data Privacy Catch-22.', strip (Hammer/Anvil/Trap), TOC with all 6 anchor buttons (overview/hammer/anvil/trap/market/next) scrolling to corresponding ids — all OK. Comparison tables: hammer (4 headers, 3 rows), anvil (3,3), market (3,3) — all populated. Share + copy-link buttons present. CTA 'catch22-cta-contact' navigates to /#contact and the contact section mounts. Alias /duty-of-care renders the same brief. Landing page shows catch22-teaser inside Problem section with 'The Hammer · The Anvil · The Trap' text and links to /catch-22; all three core-team cards render (founder-ceo, founder-cto, core-team-sidra with TalTech badge & advisory link href=/#advisory); advisor-card-sidra still present in Advisory Board. Footer footer-catch22-link href=/catch-22 navigates correctly. /sitemap.xml returns HTTP 200 and contains <loc>https://thirdrailsystems.ee/catch-22</loc>.
